posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been working on moving from AirTable to Monday and building out a CRM.

I have four boards: Leads, Clients, Companies, Deals.

I’d like to auto convert a lead to a client when the lead is marked as qualified and the deal is won.

It feels like the automation in Monday are a bit limited and the only way I can think to this is by triggering a webhook that would then do this from something like Integromat.

How would you go about this? Am I missing something with automation?

Screen Shot 2022-06-21 at 8.30.01 AM2136×130 26.5 KB

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
